title: Third-Party Security Assessment
verbatim: Financial institutions shall obtain independent security assessments of critical third-party service providers at least annually. Assessments shall evaluate the service provider's security controls, data protection practices, and compliance with contractual security requirements. Assessment results shall be reviewed by the institution's risk management function.
translation: Get independent security assessments of your critical third-party providers at least yearly. Evaluate their security controls, data protection, and compliance with your contractual requirements. Your risk management team must review the results.
evidence: Independent security assessment reports for critical vendors
Risk management review records of assessments

artifacts.name: Third-Party Assessment Policy
artifacts.description: Policy for conducting independent security assessments of critical service providers

artifacts.name: Third-Party Assessment Reports
artifacts.description: Independent security assessment reports for critical third-party providers

artifacts.name: Risk Management Review Records
artifacts.description: Records of risk management review of third-party assessment results

title: Third-Party Certification Requirements
verbatim: Financial institutions shall require critical third-party service providers to maintain recognised security certifications such as ISO 27001, SOC 2, or equivalent. Certification status shall be monitored on an ongoing basis and lapses in certification shall trigger a reassessment of the service provider's risk profile.
translation: Require critical vendors to hold recognised security certifications like ISO 27001 or SOC 2. Monitor their certification status continuously. If a vendor's certification lapses, trigger a risk reassessment immediately.
evidence: Risk reassessment records for certification lapses

artifacts.name: Third-Party Certification Policy
artifacts.description: Policy requiring critical vendors to maintain recognised security certifications

artifacts.name: Vendor Certification Register
artifacts.description: Register tracking certification status of all critical third-party providers

artifacts.name: Certification Lapse Assessment Reports
artifacts.description: Risk reassessment reports triggered by vendor certification lapses
